title: Welcome to Vanilla
description: Spice up your worlds without changing your vanilla experience!
body: Adventurer... I see you're on the page for Welcome to Vanilla, in that case, I'll explain what this modpack adds to your game. WTV is supposed to be a lightweight Vanilla+ modpack for your Minecraft experience to help you in minor ways. But don't get it mixed up, this mod still adds some new things that won't impact your game so much, such as all of Yung's Structure Mods and Medieval Additions. Now what are you waiting for, give it a try, and I swear you won't regret it!
